message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add patterns for scripts/test-label-e2e-*.log and .agent-mail.yaml
to prevent E2E test log files and agent coordination config from
being tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -70,3 +70,9 @@ e2e/*.lock
 
 # Go test coverage profiles
 *.cover
+
+# E2E test log files
+scripts/test-label-e2e-*.log
+
+# Agent coordination config
+.agent-mail.yaml
